## Contract & Security

- [ ] CHK001 Interface contract (OpenAPI/AsyncAPI) is published and validated.
- [ ] CHK002 No hardcoded credentials exist in the codebase.
- [ ] CHK003 Sensitive data is masked in application logs.

## Resilience & Processing

- [ ] CHK004 Retry logic is configured exclusively for transient network errors.
- [ ] CHK005 Idempotency logic is verified (processing the same message twice is safe).
- [ ] CHK006 Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) or error logging mechanism is active.

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
